title: Taco Bowl
description: Seasoned ground beef over creamy rice, finished with shredded cheese and sour cream. All the taco flavors in a bowl.

ingredients.item: low-sodium beef broth or tomato sauce

steps.instruction: Cook rice in broth or water according to package directions until very soft. Drain if needed.
Stir heavy cream or milk into hot rice. Simmer on low for 3–4 minutes, stirring frequently, until thick and creamy. Remove from heat.
Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium heat, breaking into very fine crumbles as it cooks.
Drain all fat. Return pan to heat and add broth or tomato sauce and all spices. Stir well and cook 2–3 minutes until liquid is absorbed but meat remains moist.
To assemble: place creamed rice in a bowl as the base. Spoon moist taco beef over rice.
Top with finely shredded cheese and a dollop of sour cream. Stir together before serving.

notes: The creamed rice acts as a binding base, keeping the dish cohesive and delicious. Sour cream and cheese add great richness.
